THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT Q-ZAR,A PARTNERSHIP WHITEMAN, DON $260.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $260.00, DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE COMPLAINT FOR FRAUD IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL NOT RECOVER COSTS PURSUANT TO CCP 998 (C) BUT DEFENDANTS SHALL RECOVER COSTS OF SUIT OF $153.66 AS PROVIDED IN CCP SECTION 1032. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
